consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' is clearly indicated in the primary invoice fields (Sold To and Consigned To) with matching address details and country 'China'. Normalizations applied for formatting differences. The invoice's primary consignee corresponds exactly with the certificate consignee (rules 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2.1, 4.2.3).

goods_description.certificate_value:
Mill's standard
27 reels of Saica Testliner 90gsm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' in the certificate is exactly present in the invoice description without discrepancies, considering allowed normalization (rule 4.3.2). Invoice contains the same product text clearly matching certificate's main product description.

quantity.invoice_value:
Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT
Total Unit Count: 27 Reels
quantity.motivation: Quantity of '49.770 MT' gross/net in the certificate matches the 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT' in the invoice exactly (rule 4.4.1 and 4.4.3). The unit count 27 reels also matches the certificate's quantity description. Allowed normalization of units applied.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates 'France' as country of origin and invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE'. Exact match after normalization with special LC exception applied (rule 2.2). No contradictions found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match exactly with allowed normalization and LC exception applied. The document pair can be approved automatically.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
